text.content:
Follower Rules

Hirelings

  • Drop NPC actors into Hirelings.
  • Hirelings have no module-enforced cap.
  • Use the hireling fields for contract, reliability, status, terms, and notes.

Henchmen

  • Drop character actors into Henchmen.
  • Maximum henchmen equals the leader's Fellowship Bonus.
  • When the leader accepts an XP reward, each henchman gains half that reward, rounded down, for the same reason.
